Where the Crawdads Sing (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $90,230,760Details
International Box Office $54,123,205
Worldwide Box Office $144,353,965
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,187,667
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,927,582
Total $7,115,249
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kya is an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the “Marsh Girl” haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,253,227 (19.1% of total gross)
Legs:5.23 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$24,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,650 opening theaters/3,650 max. theaters, 7.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $102,484,319

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 15th, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: July 21st, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
July 21st, 2022 (Wide) (New Zealand)
July 22nd, 2022 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
July 28th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
August 17th, 2022 (Wide), released as Là où chantent les écrevisses (France)
Video Release: August 30th, 2022 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sexual content and some violence including a sexual assault.
(Rating bulletin 2739 (cert #53621), 7/6/2022)
Running Time: 125 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Abandoned Child, Addiction, Child Abuse, Coming of Age, Domestic Abuse, Dysfunctional Family, Murder Mystery, Relationships Gone Wrong, Sex Crimes
Subgenre: Mystery Drama

Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 3000 Pictures, Hello Sunshine, Columbia Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Kya is an abandoned girl who raised herself to adulthood in the dangerous marshlands of North Carolina. For years, rumors of the “Marsh Girl” haunted Barkley Cove, isolating the sharp and resilient Kya from her community. Drawn to two young men from town, Kya opens herself to a new and startling world; but when one of them is found dead, she is immediately cast by the community as the main suspect. As the case unfolds, the verdict as to what actually happened becomes increasingly unclear, threatening to reveal the many secrets that lay within the marsh.
